title: ProductOrServiceInvocationRequestedActionTypeValues
description: Types of Requested Actions in Product or Service Invocation

x-enumeration-literals.name: Information Retrieval (Inquiry)
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Request for data from a product/service without changing it.

Example:  
Show current account balance 
Retrieve last 10 transactions 
Check loan outstanding balance 
View credit card limit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Execution
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Initiating a financial or operational transaction.

Example:  
Make a one-time payment 
Transfer funds to another account 
Repay loan installment 
Purchase foreign currency

x-enumeration-literals.name: Setup/Configuration (Recurring or Future)
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Defining new standing instructions, recurring services, or scheduled actions.

Example: 
 
Set up a recurring payment/standing order 
Schedule a future-dated transfer 
Set card spending limit 
Open a new fixed deposit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Update/Modification
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Changing details of an existing product, service, or instruction.

Example: 
Update recurring payment details (amount/frequency) 
Change loan repayment date 
Modify maturity instructions on a deposit 
Update beneficiary details

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cancellation/Termination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Stopping or closing a service, order, or instruction.

Example:  
Cancel a recurring payment 
Close a savings account 
Block a lost debit card 
Cancel a pending transfer
